functions.name: QueryErrorAlert
QueryBoundary
params:
{
    isLoading = false,
    isError = false,
    error,
    isEmpty = false,
    errorFallback = "Failed to load data.",
    errorTitle,
    severity = "error",
    onRetry,
    loadingFallback,
    emptyFallback,
    variant = "inline",
    children,
}

functions.name: SectionCard
params:
{
    title,
    description,
    action,
    children,
    sx,
    contentSx,
}

functions.name: StatCard
params:
{
    label,
    value,
    description,
    icon,
    loading = false,
}
